title: Arora 8836 World's Best Dad Travel Mug, Stainless Steel
features: World's Best Dad - this travel mug for Dad has a perfect message to show how speicial your Dad is
Keep your drinks hot or cold for hours - perfect for on-the-go Dadslong fishing days
High quality stainless steel. Durable, reusable and easy to clean for everyday use
Perfect gift - show your appreciation for your Dad with this thoughtful and practical present. A perfect gift for events including Birthdays, Christmas and Father's Day
Versatile - ideal for hot coffee, tea or cold beverages. A versatile companion for any Dad
Classic design - A timeless style that will never go out of fashion
description: World's Best Dad Travel Mug. Stylish travel mug. the perfect gift for busy guys to keep their favourite drink hot or cold wherever they go. detailing information on the sports and hobbies and in some cases the quirks of the game. Handwash recommended.
